scripts.db:push: pnpm -C services/identity db:push && pnpm -C services/org db:push && pnpm -C services/attendance db:push
scripts.seed: pnpm -C services/identity seed && pnpm -C services/org seed && pnpm -C services/attendance seed
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d && node -e "setTimeout(()=>{},4000)" && pnpm db:push && pnpm seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n identity,org,attend,gateway,web -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "pnpm -C services/identity dev" "pnpm -C services/org dev" "pnpm -C services/attendance dev" "pnpm -C gateway dev" "pnpm -C web dev"
